user.title: Set up IP Ban Manager
user.description: Enter trusted IP addresses or CIDR networks. Use one entry per line, or separate entries with commas.

error.invalid_ip_address: Enter valid IP addresses or CIDR networks.

init.title: Manage IP Ban Manager
init.description: Edit either list and save. Changes apply immediately.

allowed_ips.name: Allowed IPs
allowed_ips.description: IP addresses or CIDR networks that should never be banned. Use one entry per line.

banned_ips.name: Banned IPs
banned_ips.description: Currently blocked IP addresses. Existing rows include the ban timestamp; new rows can be just an IP.

error.invalid_ip_address: Enter valid IP addresses or CIDR networks.
error.invalid_banned_ip: Enter only valid IP addresses in the banned IP list.

invalid_ip_address.message: {ip_address} is not a valid IP address.

invalid_network.message: {network} is not a valid IP address or CIDR network.

ip_address_allowlisted.message: {ip_address} is allowlisted, so it was not banned.
